title: illigera pulchra
intro: Illigera pulchra, also known as the golden back umbrella plant or golden umbrella plant, is a species of flowering plant in the family Hernandiaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Illigera pulchra include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and protect against infections, as well as its potential to lower cholesterol levels and improve cardiovascular health. Illigera pulchra can be prepared into various herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
